system.description:
*hand*, *magical*, *+1 damage*

An 8-inch fang, bound to a wooden hilt by fiber that never rots. A cruel-looking thing, with strange carvings along the blade.

**Something interesting:** The fang looks like it came from a **cynddaraig** (page @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.JjyXyicr58qim0bV]{206}), and the markings are definitely some sort of spell related to blood and soil.

**Something useful:** When you **_bury the_** **_fang-dagger and water the soil with blood_**, the ground buckles and bulges. A minute later, a full-grown cynddaraig bursts from the soil—angry, confused, and hungry. The spell grants no control over the beast and provides no way to dismiss it. The dagger is gone, now a tooth in the rage-drake’s maw.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.gnP4Q10EDePdvgqz]{Green Lords}.*
